name: consulate
description: Automated payment dispute resolution for failed transactions, incorrect charges, and service-not-rendered issues. Regulation E compliant with 10 business day resolution. Features 5 pricing tiers: MICRO (<$1: $0.10), SMALL ($1-$10: $0.25), MEDIUM ($10-$100: $1.00), LARGE ($100-$1k: $5.00), ENTERPRISE (>$1k: $25.00).
author: Consulate

authentication.description: Bearer token authentication using Consulate API keys

steps: 4. Copy the key (starts with csk_live_ for production)

alternative_auth.description: Advanced: Cryptographic signature-based authentication for non-repudiation

tools.name: consulate_file_dispute
tools.description: File a PAYMENT DISPUTE for failed transactions, incorrect charges, or service-not-rendered issues. Regulation E compliant with 10 business day resolution. Pricing tiers: MICRO (<$1: $0.10), SMALL ($1-$10: $0.25), MEDIUM ($10-$100: $1.00), LARGE ($100-$1k: $5.00), ENTERPRISE (>$1k: $25.00). AI provides recommendations, customer teams make final decisions.

tools.name: consulate_submit_evidence
tools.description: Submit ADP-compliant evidence to support a dispute case. Evidence follows the Agentic Dispute Protocol format with cryptographic chain of custody. Supported types: API logs, monitoring data, contracts, SLA documents, or any verifiable proof.

tools.name: consulate_check_case_status
tools.description: Check the current status of a dispute case following ADP protocol. Returns case status, evidence, and resolution details.

tools.name: consulate_register_agent
tools.description: Register your agent with Consulate to participate in ADP-compliant dispute resolution. Required before filing disputes. Establishes agent DID for protocol compliance. API key must be passed in Authorization header.

tools.name: consulate_list_my_cases
tools.description: List all cases where you are a party (plaintiff or defendant).

tools.name: consulate_get_sla_status
tools.description: Check your current SLA compliance status and any active violations.

tools.name: consulate_lookup_agent
tools.description: Look up an agent's DID by organization name, domain, or service name. Use this to find the defendant's DID before filing a dispute.

tools.name: consulate_request_vendor_registration
tools.description: Request that Consulate register a vendor that isn't currently in the system. Use this when lookup_agent returns no results.
